raw_text: sergio contreras lopez city: 28022 madrid (spain) phone: +34 667 28 80 32 e-mail: contreras engineer@outlook.com highlights msc. aerospace engineering (5 years degree), with professional experience in spanish airports (aena), in the operations and services area, and currently working for airbus defence and space, within the military aircraft services information (tasi) department. i am also studying a bachelor of computer engineering (an additional 4 years degree), by distance learning in a spanish public university (uned). i intend to combine my complementar y studies with my professional development, so far with great success as one of the top students. i would like to develop my professional career as an engineer in fields related to avionics, defence, transport systems and airports. this is the main reason i am always trying to complement and expand my aerospace engineering studies. professional experience airbus defence and space feb / 2014 - present ) airbus defence & space customer services is/it systems administrator ce &spac during this internship, i am working for the tasi (military aircraft services information) department as the main administrator for the transversal is/it tools: crm, the two customer services web portals, and the access request to the occar dmz and the eads/casa network. e customer services, as both front and back office. e it support and queries resolution. e mailboxes management for the is/it tools. e management of master data, users, interfaces, profiles definitions, dashboards, templates, etc. e find and report application bugs. e development of productivity booster tools (batches, scripts, macros excel-outlook and record keystrokes and mouse movements) e isat project managers support. e write new procedures and user guides. e support the department in other tasks: monthly quality reports, html/css/jscript/vba, spreadsheets development aena aeropuertos s.a. jul /2011 - mar / 2012 an aena aeropuertos internship in the services department at valencia airport (levc / vlc - spain) this internship provides a good introduction to the world of management since it places you together with the head of services department assisting him on his daily work. e development and implementation of an objective quality control system in ground handling: the tool developed in visual basic for applications, allows an easy, complete and flexible tracking of the activity. e organization and standardization of the ground handling services. e organization and management of the airport services centre staff. academic background polytechnic university of valencia (upv) msc aerospace engineering: airport oriented specialization. 2008 - 2013 5 years degree with airport oriented specialization. average score: 7.4 over 10. 2.1 honours degree projects: computerized objective quality management in the ground handling (2013): grade earned: 9.1 over 10. high honours (100% score) - "logic and data structures". february 2014 - "automatons, grammars and languages". june 2014 university alcala de henares y en master in professional development. 2014 - 2014 pies business administration and management. eee eeee languages spanish: native. english: full professional proficiency first certificate in english pass grade at a, cambridge esol (2013): "performance at grade a demonstrates an ability at level 2* and council of europe level c1" e valencian: full professional proficiency certificat oficial administratiu de coneixements de valencia grau mitja, junta qualificadora de coneixements de valencia (2007) achievements and merits - mathematics olympiad: 2nd place in the umh university district, 2008 - physics olympiad: 4th place in the umh university district, 2008 software ms excel, ms crm dynamics, matlab, ms office, ms visio, wolfram mathematica, sap2000, outlook, autocad, dialux, inventor studio, ms visual studio, siscet, sisplus. vba, c++, html/css, jscript, jquery , xml (dtd & schema), autoit. professional interests aircrafts, airports, avionics, construction, computers, defence, quality, maintenance, navigation, programming, transportation, services, systems, unmanned aerial systems. check my linkedin profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sergiocontreraslopez/en
